[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011000111 6
1 0011111001 6
2 1001000100 3
3 1110111111 9
4 1111010111 8
5 1011111101 8
6 1101111110 8
7 1111110011 8

12 21 1110111101 8
